name: Key Lime Pie/no Eggs
recipeInstructions:
Of all the key lime pie recipes I've made, this is by far my favorite,
and that of my friends also. It's also one of the easiest.
In a bowl, combine the lime juice and condensed milk. In a separate
bowl, whip the cream until it forms stiff peaks. You might want to add a
small amount of powdered sugar if the key limes are too tart for you.
Fold the whipped cream into the lime juice and condensed milk mixture.
Pour into pie crust and refrigerate for 8 hours.
NO EGGS AND NO COOKING REQUIRED!
